full_roadmap.purpose: Base command surface, scoped reads, patch gates, audit chain, rollback discipline.
Document intake, source-gap reports, dry-run ingestion, receipts, and context library.

full_roadmap.phase: 3. Codebase index and symbolic runtime map
full_roadmap.purpose: Index code, identify engine families, map runtime roles, and separate code memory from document memory.
Sandbox planning/runs, safe test inventory, canonical test run, and test binding gates.
Human review ledger, final lockfile, deferral handling, disposition report, and canonical test pass.
Related-file map, risk neighbors, patch impact map, runtime role risk scoring.
Machine-readable status and static dashboard gauges before any dashboard levers.
Define command modes and check allowed commands before hard blocking.
Bind canonical engines to source-law / implementation / validation documents.
Allow the local LLM to draft proposals while Forge verifies targets, evidence, hashes, tests, and rollback.
One readiness surface for source grounding, scope, snapshot, sandbox, tests, rollback, and human approval.
Use LLM-assisted repair in sandbox only; defer stubborn engines instead of blocking the whole build.
Give the local model durable session memory and tool request structure without direct authority.
Project-state snapshots, shadow restore, diffs, and replay before multi-file writes.
Turn the static gauges into a clearer control surface showing roadmap, gates, deferred work, tests, and readiness.
Use Forge to safely build Gilligan, Athena, Neo, memory stack, ChristPing listener, drift arbitration, SPC, loop resurrection, plugin loader, and UI.
Installer, recovery script, user/dev/audit guides, export tool, GitHub release, and offline restore package.

plain_english: The engine deferral is complete and canonical tests are clean. The next safe move is to make the roadmap itself authoritative enough to guide future patches instead of only naming the current stuck task.
